metadata.name: Schedule Carpet Cleaning for Unit Turnover

description: A unit is now vacant and needs carpet cleaning before the new tenant moves in. The manager must schedule a vendor.

nodes.task_description: Identify the vacant unit and verify that it requires carpet cleaning as part of the standard turnover process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the need for carpet cleaning.

nodes.task_description: Select a preferred carpet cleaning vendor and request a quote or schedule the service based on standard pricing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts an approved vendor to book the service.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the carpet cleaning and schedule it to be completed before the new tenant's move-in date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates and schedules the work order correctly.
